text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both up modestly in the last 24 hours, with Ethereum slightly outpacing Bitcoin despite extreme fear conditions, suggesting some selective buying among altcoins. The Fear & Greed index at 23 reflects panic selling, but the 10-point weekly climb indicates fear may be stabilizing rather than deepening. Bitcoin dominance remains elevated at 56.1% with moderate volume, pointing to cautious risk-off positioning where traders are rotating toward safer assets rather than capitulating en masse.
